title: Envelope
description: Top-level wrapper for any wire message. The receiver validates this shape first, then validates `payload` against the schema selected by `kind`.

protocol_version.description: MAJOR.MINOR — receivers refuse mismatched majors during the client-ready / bot-ready handshake.

kind.description: Selects which payload schema to apply.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp from the sender.

session_token.description: Per-session HMAC token. Required on every message except the initial pairing exchange.

payload.description: The kind-specific payload. Validated separately by the receiver.
